ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the economic indicator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the economic indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the data */,
  "seasonal_adjustment" INTEGER /* Whether the data is seasonally adjusted */,
  "population_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the population */,
  "population_group" TEXT /* Group identifier for the population */,
  "observation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for observations */,
  "observation_start_units" INTEGER /* Units for the start date */,
  "observation_end_date" TEXT /* End date for observations */,
  "observation_end_units" INTEGER /* Units for the end date */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  "update_units" INTEGER /* Units for the update date */,
  "data_delay" INTEGER /* Delay in days for data reporting */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the indicator belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES indicator_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* ID of the economic indicator being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data at the time of update */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the update */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being updated */,
  "update_comment" TEXT /* Comments about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES indicator_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the population data */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the population */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Group name for the population */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the population data was last updated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the population */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* ID of the economic indicator being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* ID of the economic indicator for the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* ID of the economic indicator the permission applies to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "permission_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the version */,
  "indicator_id" TEXT /* ID of the economic indicator the version applies to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* ID of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
